commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6393b6239eead58241d8c0b6be94af642f97a1fa)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Telegram `onReasoningStream` fallback and unit test for `/reasoning on`, plus two script/test metadata additions already present on current main.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests +48, Other +1. Total +68 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main emits durable `isReasoning` payloads for `/reasoning on`, then shared dispatch skips those payloads before Telegram delivery; I did not run a live Telegram session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual maintainer review is needed because the branch has a blocking correctness finding, lacks live Telegram proof, and overlaps several candidate fixes for the same open issue.

target.title: fix(telegram): deliver reasoning as durable block when /reasoning on
target.body:
## Summary
Fix `/reasoning on` dropping the thinking lane on Telegram. When reasoning mode is "on" (not "stream"), the `onReasoningStream` callback was unconditionally `undefined` because both the reasoning draft stream and the progress draft path were inactive. This caused the model's thinking content to be silently lost — produced and archived, but never delivered to the Telegram chat.

The fix adds a third fallback branch that sends reasoning text as a durable (non-streaming) block message when `forceBlockStreamingForReasoning` is true. It also wires `onReasoningEnd` for the block-streaming path to reset progress state.

Fixes #94937

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: Under `/reasoning on`, the model's `<think>` content is generated and archived but never rendered on Telegram. Under `/reasoning stream` the same content streams in an ephemeral block correctly.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 24.13.1, Linux x64
- **Code analysis path**: See root cause analysis in issue comments (5 Whys)
- **Test framework**: Vitest

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts --run
```

**After-fix evidence**:
```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  130 passed (130)
   Start at  22:19:21
   Duration  19.52s
```

**Observed result after the fix**: `onReasoningStream` callback is now defined when `/reasoning on` is active. The extracted and formatted reasoning text (e.g. `Thinking\n\n_ambient reasoning_`) is delivered via durable `sendPayload` instead of being silently dropped. No reasoning draft stream is created in "on" mode, matching intent.

**What was not tested**: Live Telegram end-to-end test with real model thinking output (requires configured bot + reasoning-capable model). The fix was verified at unit-test level and by tracing the full callback chain from `onReasoningStream` → `splitTelegramReasoningText` → `sendPayload` → `deliverInboundReplyWithMessageSendContext`.

## Tests and validation
| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | ✅ | 130 passed, includes new test for reasoning "on" durable delivery |
| Type Check | N/A | `tsgo` lanes only — not run locally per repo policy |
| Lint | N/A | `oxfmt`/`oxlint` config on file — no structural issues detected |

## Risk checklist
**Did user-visible behavior change?** `Yes` — `/reasoning on` now delivers thinking as persistent block messages on Telegram (previously silent drop).
**Did config, environment, or migration behavior change?** `No`
**Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change?** `No`

## Current review state
**What is the next action?** Maintainer review requested
